texts.label: text
texts.orig: Last night the chef surprised us with a culinary adventure.
texts.text: Last night the chef surprised us with a culinary adventure.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The waiter offered a  *steaming bowl of * *paella*  that instantly transported the diners to a sunny Mediterranean coast.
texts.text: The waiter offered a  *steaming bowl of * *paella*  that instantly transported the diners to a sunny Mediterranean coast.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The dessert’s  ***unexpected*** * * *arcobaleno* * of flavors*  left everyone in awe.
texts.text: The dessert’s  ***unexpected*** * * *arcobaleno* * of flavors*  left everyone in awe.
